overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a foggy, neon-lit district of Night City. The player character walks along streets and sidewalks, crosses a busy intersection with taxis and other vehicles, and enters a narrow alleyway with vending machines.

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street next to metal barriers, heading toward distant neon lights

entered.detail: green metal crowd control barriers lining the right side of the street
tall multi-story residential buildings with illuminated windows
glowing neon signs visible through the fog in the distance
tall street lamps casting greenish light

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy city street lined with metal barriers on the right. Neon signs glow through the haze in the distance, and a few pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The atmosphere is dark and cyberpunk with green-tinted street lighting.

events.description: moves from street to sidewalk with bright vending machines and advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking past illuminated vending machines and large neon advertisements on the left

entered.detail: bright blue and yellow vending machines with 'FEEL THE RUSH' and 'CHOOH2' branding
large glowing advertisement panels with cyberpunk branding
trees with pink illuminated blossoms visible across the street
yellow striped pedestrian crossing visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Transitioning to a sidewalk lined with glowing vending machines and large neon advertisements on the left. Cherry blossom trees are visible across the street as the camera approaches a crosswalk at the intersection.

events.description: approaches crosswalk and waits for traffic light to change
begins crossing the street as traffic passes by

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the street between passing taxis and other vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab waiting at the intersection before driving through
green sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light for pedestrians
concrete wall with 'ST IMP RACH' and 'NO FUTURE' graffiti tags
large vertical digital billboards with animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: Approaching a busy intersection with a yellow striped crosswalk. The camera waits for the traffic light, watching yellow taxis and a green sports car pass by, then crosses the street. A graffiti-covered wall is visible on the right side.

events.description: finishes crossing and continues along the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past storefronts and neon signs, following other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: commercial shop fronts with illuminated signs and displays
metal garbage bins on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the camera walks along a busy sidewalk lined with storefronts and large neon billboards. Several pedestrians walk in the same direction, and a person in a distinctive yellow jacket walks ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with food vending machines

events.description: turns into a narrow alleyway with Burrito XXL vending machines

agents.ego_description: entering a narrow alley and approaching illuminated food vending machines

notable_agents.action: person standing near a doorway at the end of the alley

entered.detail: pair of red and yellow 'BURRITO XXL' vending machines with 'IT'S BIG' branding
tight concrete walls enclosing the narrow passage
green neon arrow sign pointing down the alley
doorway framed with green neon lighting at the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: Turning into a narrow, enclosed alleyway featuring prominent 'Burrito XXL' vending machines with bright red and yellow signage. The space is tight with concrete walls on both sides, illuminated by green neon lights, and a person stands near a doorway at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy, neon-lit urban district that transitions from a desolate street into a bustling city intersection. It begins by moving along a dark, green-tinted road lined with metal barriers, where distant neon signs glow faintly through a thick haze. As the camera shifts toward the sidewalk, the environment brightens with the glow of vending machines and large advertisements, passing cherry blossom trees that line the opposite side of the street. The scene then opens up at a busy intersection, where the camera pauses at a yellow striped crosswalk to watch yellow taxis and a green sports car stream past. Finally, the movement continues across the street, passing a graffiti-covered wall as the camera integrates into the vibrant activity of the city.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, neon-lit city sidewalk into the claustrophobic confines of a narrow alleyway. It begins by moving along a crowded pedestrian path lined with glowing storefronts and towering billboards, following a person in a distinctive yellow jacket through the crowd. As the camera reaches the edge of the main thoroughfare, the scene shifts abruptly as it turns away from the open street and enters a tight, enclosed space. The environment then transforms into a concrete corridor illuminated by green neon lights and the bright red and yellow signage of Burrito XXL vending machines. The movement finally concludes as the camera approaches a solitary figure standing near a doorway at the far end of the alley.
